name: Shepherd's Pie (Syd)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the Hot Italian sausages lengthwise in half and slice 1/4 inch thick.
2. Peel and cut potatoes into 1 inch chunks.
3. Place ground beef and sausages in a medium skillet. Cook, breaking up meat over medium high heat until it loses some of its pink color and releases juices.
4. Add tomatoes, mushrooms, garlic, and vinegar. Simmer uncovered, stirring occasionally, and breaking up tomatoes for about 10 minutes.
5. Stir in peas, basil, 1/2 tsp salt, oregano, and pepper. Simmer for another 10 minutes.
6. Remove from heat. Boil potatoes until tender, then drain and transfer to a large mixing bowl.
7. Beat milk, cheese, butter, remaining 1/2 tsp salt, and pepper in the bowl until smooth.
8. Preheat oven to 350°F. Spoon meat mixture into two quart shallow casserole dishes.
9. Spread potato mixture evenly over the top of the meat mixture.
10. Bake until golden and bubbling, about 45-50 minutes.
11. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
This recipe yields approximately 6 servings, with each serving containing about 436 calories.
